name: interior_passage_v2_p1
description: Pass 1: Structure-preserving translation for interior passages, vaulted corridors, cloisters. Uses ControlNet Union for edge/perspective preservation.
intended_image_type: Interior architectural sketches: vaulted corridors, arcades, cloisters, passages with arches and columns
pass_purpose: Translate from sketch medium to color photograph while preserving geometry and composition

controlnet.notes: Union model handles canny/softedge/depth - calibrated for interior_passage

prompt_templates.positive: present-day color architectural photograph of the same vaulted stone passage, realistic limestone masonry, authentic stone floor slabs, documentary photography, natural daylight, subtle warm gray tones, realistic shadows, photographed with a modern camera
prompt_templates.negative: black and white, monochrome, sketch, drawing, engraving, illustration, etching, CGI, render, plastic surfaces, washed out, overexposed, distorted arches, malformed columns, unrealistic textures, text, watermark

expected_failure_modes: denoise < 0.35: Output stays trapped in sketch medium (monochrome)
cfg > 6.0: Forces prompt too strongly, loses source character
Missing 'black and white' in negative: Output remains monochrome
review_criteria: Arches and columns preserved in correct positions
notes: v2.1 adds ControlNet Union support. Calibration in progress - testing denoise variants 0.38, 0.42, 0.45 on tuning set. Production_ready=false until holdout validation complete.
